findings.title: Empty alt on non-decorative image
findings.description: Image has alt="" but is not marked as decorative (no role="presentation" or aria-hidden="true").
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text, or mark as decorative with role="presentation".

findings.title: Image missing width and height
findings.description: Image lacks both width and height attributes, which can contribute to Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS).
findings.recommendation: Add width and height attributes to prevent layout shifts during loading.

findings.title: Missing strict-transport-security
findings.description: The response is missing the strict-transport-security header.
findings.recommendation: Add Strict-Transport-Security header with max-age of at least 31536000 (1 year).

findings.title: Missing x-content-type-options
findings.description: The response is missing the x-content-type-options header.
findings.recommendation: Add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff to prevent MIME type sniffing.

findings.title: Missing referrer-policy
findings.description: The response is missing the referrer-policy header.
findings.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy header (e.g., strict-origin-when-cross-origin).

findings.title: Missing permissions-policy
findings.description: The response is missing the permissions-policy header.
findings.recommendation: Add a Permissions-Policy header to control browser feature access.

findings.title: Title too short
findings.description: Title is 13 characters, below the recommended minimum of 30.
findings.recommendation: Write a more descriptive title.

findings.title: Missing meta description
findings.description: The page has no <meta name="description"> tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a meta description between 70 and 160 characters.

findings.title: Missing canonical link
findings.description: The page has no <link rel="canonical"> tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a canonical link to indicate the preferred URL for this page.

findings.title: Missing og:title
findings.description: The page is missing the <meta property="og:title"> tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a og:title meta tag for better social media sharing.

findings.title: Missing og:description
findings.description: The page is missing the <meta property="og:description"> tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a og:description meta tag for better social media sharing.

findings.title: Missing og:image
findings.description: The page is missing the <meta property="og:image"> tag.
findings.recommendation: Add a og:image meta tag for better social media sharing.

findings.title: AI response parse failure
findings.description: Could not parse the AI code review response as JSON for https://studiozissou.webflow.io.
findings.recommendation: Re-run the review or inspect the code manually.
